questions.title: Array Out-of-Bounds
questions.description: This C program has a bug in the loop condition which causes it to access memory outside the array bounds. Fix the loop condition.

questions.title: Dangling Reference
questions.description: This C++ function returns a reference to a local variable that will be destroyed when the function returns. Fix the function to return by value.

questions.title: Invalid Pointer Assignment
questions.description: This C++ program tries to assign an integer value directly to a pointer. Fix it to point to the address of x.

questions.title: Java String Comparison
questions.description: In Java, using '==' for string comparison checks reference equality instead of content. Fix it to correctly compare the content of strings.

questions.title: Python Recursion Base Case
questions.description: This Python factorial function is missing its base case, which will lead to a recursion error. Fix it.

questions.title: Missing Return Value
questions.description: This C++ function is declared to return an 'int' but doesn't return anything. Fix the function logic.

questions.title: Java String Concatenation
questions.description: This Java program results in unexpected string concatenation instead of mathematical addition. Fix it to perform addition first.

questions.title: Integer Division Problem
questions.description: In C, dividing two integers results in an integer. Fix the code to perform a float division and correctly display 2.5.

questions.title: Wrong Pointer Arithmetic
questions.description: This C program is trying to access an out-of-bounds element using pointer arithmetic. Fix the offset to point to the last element (30).

questions.title: Python String Split
questions.description: The current split() call in Python splits by whitespace by default. Fix it to split the string by commas.
questions.buggyCode:
s = "a,b,c"
print(s.split())

questions.title: C++ Boolean Condition
questions.description: The current 'if' condition is always false (0). Fix it to correctly compare x with 0.

questions.title: Java Constructor Name
questions.description: The method intended to be a constructor has a 'void' return type and doesn't match the class name capitalization. Fix it.

questions.title: Java Access Modifier
questions.description: Trying to access a 'private' field directly from another class is an error. Fix the code by providing and using a public getter method.

questions.title: Java String Immutability
questions.description: In Java, strings are immutable and cannot be modified using array indexing. Fix the code to create a new string with the first character capitalized.

questions.title: C Pointer Initialization
questions.description: Trying to dereference an uninitialized pointer causes a runtime crash. Fix the code by assigning the address of a valid variable to the pointer.

questions.title: C String Comparison
questions.description: In C, using '==' for string comparison only compares pointer addresses. Fix the code to correctly compare the content of the strings.

questions.title: Matrix Transpose Logic
questions.description: The indexing for the matrix transpose is reversed. Fix the assignment logic in the nested loops.

questions.title: Python Loop Logic
questions.description: The logic erroneously uses 'break', which stops the entire inner loop if a non-even number is found. Fix it to correctly count all even numbers.

questions.title: C String Reversal (Off-by-One)
questions.description: The loop executes too many times, swapping characters back to their original positions. Fix the loop condition.

questions.title: Java Palindrome Logic
questions.description: The logic for Palindrome checking incorrectly overrides the result in each iteration. Fix the condition and add a break.

questions.title: Linked List Traversal
questions.description: The traversal condition incorrectly skips the last node of the linked list. Fix the while loop condition.

questions.title: Find Second Largest
questions.description: The 'else if' condition is incorrectly comparing the current element with max1 instead of max2. Fix the logic.

questions.title: C Digit Count Error
questions.description: The value of 'n' is not being updated within the loop, leading to an infinite loop. Fix the statement.

questions.title: Java Fibonacci Recursion
questions.description: The recursive calls in this Fibonacci function are identical, resulting in wrong results. Fix the second recursive call.

questions.title: Python Sorted Array Check
questions.description: The logic incorrectly resets the 'sorted' flag to True even if an unsorted element is found. Fix the logic.

questions.title: C++ Array Sum Over-bounds
questions.description: The loop starts at a wrong index and goes out of bounds. Fix the loop initialization and condition.

questions.title: Java Reverse Number Logic
questions.description: The 'rev' variable is being overwritten in each iteration. Fix the formula to correctly build the reversed number.
